mission: Canonize and migrate @beep/schema to namespace-first concept modules with small role files, exact PascalCase public subpaths, retired suite aggregators, and lint-enforced topology closure.

phases.name: Doctrine and goal packet
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: Architecture docs, package README, and goal packet agree on canonical topology.

phases.name: Pilot concept modules
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: Duration and Glob expose canonical concept indexes while old imports remain compatible.

phases.name: Simple concept migration
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: Targeted topical concepts expose canonical exact subpaths from PascalCase source directories; Sql and sqlite remain deleted.

phases.name: Large concept family migration
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: Remaining high-context modules are split into role files without changing behavior.

phases.name: Consumer and export hardening
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: Package-local consumers and type tests prefer concept imports, handwritten lowercase topical imports are gone, and root-facade cleanup continues on touch.

phases.name: Exact export closure
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: Every public schema subpath is explicit; SchemaUtils helper leaves remain public; the broad package wildcard is removed.

phases.name: Remaining source topology cleanup
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: Lowercase suite directories are removed; remaining high-context concepts have canonical folders and only future value-adding splits remain.

phases.name: Enforcement automation
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: bun run beep lint schema-topology prevents lowercase topology, public role-file exports, retired casing aliases, retired suite aggregators, private parser seams, and root alias drift.

phases.name: Suite aggregator retirement
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: Pure suite aggregators are deleted, Csv only exports its own schema concept, parser seams are source-test-only, and schema-topology lint prevents regression.

completionGate.statement: Not achieved until this goal's work ships as a PR driven to mergeable via /yeet (bun run beep yeet: repair -> verify -> publish --pr -> monitor).
